text: In this moment, I am struck by a sense of curiosity and reflection. Standing outside a glass-walled room where people seem engrossed in their own worlds of learning and collaboration, I feel simultaneously connected and detached—from the others, yet aware of the collective pursuit of knowledge. The presence of the fire extinguisher and safety signs reminds me of the fragility and precarity of these constructed environments, even as they seek to foster security and discovery. There is a quiet anticipation in the air, and I find myself pondering the relationship between inside and outside, observer and participant.
